sub_goals.description: tests.js + report.json — covers every assertion in sections-v1.json with verifier:edge_case_testing (S1.A1, S1.A2, S1.A4, S2.A3, S3.A1, S3.A2, S3.A3, DCA.A6, DCA.FC.6) under the closest available production-fidelity environment, marking hardware-dependent assertions as unverifiable_without_hardware per the section charter and Principle G/H.

verification_rationale: All 9 edge-case-testing-tagged assertions have test entries. The renderer-only assertions (S3.A1, S3.A2, S3.A3) were executable as logic checks against the integrated renderer.js with the contract-shaped mock source from sections-v1.json's scenarios; results recorded as pass. The host-integration assertions (S1.A1, S1.A2, S1.A4) and SMTC assertions (S2.A3, DCA.A6, DCA.FC.6) require either a real Stream Dock host process or a real Windows SMTC environment with Apple Music; recorded as unverifiable_without_hardware per Principle G Tier 2.
